name: Sudnik — Tribunal of Cards
description: Distopijski sudija koji gradi deck od sopstvenih presuda i balansira između Mase i Vlasti.

modules.src/main.js: Flow controller i phase manager: bootstrap, fazni prelazi (draw→play→verdict→reputation→gameover/summary), event dispatching
modules.src/config.js: Sve CONFIG konstante iz GDD Appendix-a: TOTAL_CASES, resursi, HAND_SIZE, PRECEDENT_DURATION, animacioni timing-i, WEALTH_MODIFIERS, pragovi vage
modules.src/state.js: State shape iz GDD §1: createState, loadState, saveState, resetState; inicijalni starter deck, session/resources/deck/hand/precedents/currentCase/stats
modules.src/cases.js: Case generation (§4): pool crimeType/wealth/age atributa, template opisi (intro/suspect/witness), proceduralna generacija, pacing pravila za slučaj 1 i 10
modules.src/deck.js: Deck management (§2, §7): starter deck definicija, shuffle, drawCards, discardCards, reshuffle discard pile; odbaci-i-povuci mehanika
modules.src/precedents.js: Presedant sistem (§3): PRECEDENT_EFFECTS lista (p01-p15), generatePrecedent po presudi+crimeType, applyPrecedentEffects, tickPrecedents (countdown), modifyCardValue
modules.src/reputation.js: Masa/Vlast deltas (§6): VERDICT_DELTAS tabele za KRIV/SLOBODAN po crimeType, wealth modifier primena, game over detekcija, clamp 0-100
modules.src/profile.js: Profil sudnika (§8): PROFILE_TEMPLATES niz (25 rečenica), calcStrogostCategory, calcKlasniCategory, calcStarosniCategory, calcRecidivCategory, selectProfileTemplate closest-match algoritam
modules.src/ui.js: Sav DOM rendering: renderPhase (switcher), renderHand, renderCase, renderBalance (vaga traka), renderResources (Masa/Vlast trake), renderPrecedents, renderSummary, renderGameOver; event binding na dugmad
modules.styles/base.css: Reset, layout, pozadina #0D0D0D, font Georgia/serif, scrollable game-root, responsive container, utility klase
modules.styles/ui.css: Vaga (balance bar), karte (card element), dugmad (verdict/discard), resursi (Masa=crvena, Vlast=plava), HUD trake, presedant lista, case opis
modules.styles/game.css: Animacije karata (fade-in, slide, play), vaga tranzicija, profil tekst typewriter, game-over lampa gašenje, phase transition fades
